synopsis: Join Jedi Master Kelleran Beq (Ahmed Best), wise-cracking protocol droid AD-3 (Mary Holland), and astromech LX-R5 in Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge, as they guide Padawans Miguel and Kaylie (Blue Team), Gigi and Skyla (Orange Team), and Giovanni and Jayden (Purple Team) in their quest to become Jedi Knights!
title: Episode 5
